item.title: Fable – Inner Forward Pass
Vessel An EGA adventure about whether machines can grieve
Show HN: Local MCP – Claude/ChatGPT read your iMessage, Teams, files on-device
item.description:
I kept hitting the same wall: AI assistants are great until they need my context — the email thread, the calendar, the iMessage, the file on my disk. Cloud connectors can only reach things with a public API, so they physically can't touch the stuff that lives only on my machine.

So I b

item.title: Deterministic AI Auditing
Fable 5. Safety Taken to an Extreme
item.description:
I finally decided to try out Fable 5 using the standard Claude.ai interface. I have a go-to test prompt that answers simple kids' questions in an absurdly scientific style. I asked a pretty straightforward one: "Why don't cats and dogs get along?"

Immediately, the interface bum

item.title: Show HN: Strata, real-time Markdown editor you can mount as a filesystem
item.description: Hi HN. Strata is a real-time markdown editor built around document portability across agentic workflows. The same docs live on the web, mount to disk on Linux/macOS with live CRDT collaboration intact, and render inside any MCP app (claude.ai, ChatGPT). There's also a CLI, MCP server, and

item.title: Show HN: Afair – Self-organizing memory shared across your AI tools
item.description:
afair has been the one tool I can't work without for months, and I just open-sourced it. It gives every AI you use one shared memory that stays yours.

Where it comes from: I use a different AI for almost everything now, building projects, researching health questions, whatever's in front

item.title: Export Claude.ai chats, artifacts, and visible thinking
Visualization: How would 1M Starlink satellites look
Do you know what you are *really* selling? [Shreyas Doshi/Claude discussion]
"Remaining: Szabo, Le Roux, Kleiman, Musk."
Hasta Pronto – An AI Farewell Letter and Interactive Memorial – Claude
So I ran Doom inside Claude.ai
Fiszki flashcards without an app: your AI quizzes you, FSRS keeps score
Show HN: Claumon – forecasting Claude Code usage limits with a Gamma process
item.description: Anthropic's usage analytics dashboard is only available to Team and Enterprise org admins. On a Pro or Max plan all you get is /usage and the claude.ai usage page, which show where you stand right now but not where you're heading. I looked at various open-source projects but none quit

item.title: 170k Claude queries per gallon of gas?
Claude-tinderbox: Search your Claude.ai conversation history locally via MCP
Free Week of Claude Code
Show HN: OpenFeed – private dev news in your new tab, with LinkedIn and X feeds
item.description:
Fork of Hackertab (https://github.com/medyo/hackertab.dev). All sources fetch directly in your browser - nothing goes through a server.

LinkedIn and X work via your existing session cookies.

item.title: Beyond HTTP: Exposing WebRTC and Local Game Servers via UDP Tunnels
Claude.ai Pro plan quotas too small for deep research
Net-Zero Infrastructure: Implementing Solar-Scheduled Tunnel Egress
Claude.ai is experiencing elevated error rates
Never trust a parrot to check your shopping list
item.description:
... unless you know your shopping list is shorter than N, were N is unknown.

Claude.ai :

> The PDF text is extracted page by page, separated by form-feed characters (\f). To keep processing fast, the verification script only reads the first 40 pages of the file. [XXX] happens to appear on pag

item.title: Show HN: Clodcapture – save and resume Claude.ai chats across sessions
item.description: Chrome extension that captures Claude.ai conversation state and lets you reload it into a new chat. All local, no account, free. Solves the "I lost my whole debugging session" problem.

item.title: Show HN: How we made MCP development feel good
item.description:
Hey HN, I am Pietro from Manufact (https://manufact.com), we build open source dev tools and infrastructure for MCP.

You might know us for mcp-use (https:/&#x

item.title: Hackers abuse Google ads, Claude.ai chats to push Mac malware
Cancelling Claude subscription renewal immediately revokes Design access
item.description: Starting today, Anthropic now immediately revokes Claude Design access if you cancel your subscription plan renewal, even while you're still in a valid period you've already paid for. I had a Claude 20x max plan and cancelled my automatic renewal last week. My plan, which I've already

item.title: Cancelling Claude subscription renewal immediately revokes Design access
item.description:
Starting today, Anthropic now immediately revokes Claude Design access if you cancel your subscription plan renewal, even while you're still in a valid period. I had a Claude 20x max plan and cancelled my automatic renewal this month (last week)

On https://claude.ai/settings&#x

item.title: Ask HN: Former master-tech building AI systems – how to break into software?
item.description: So to keep a very long story short, I was 28, was exactly a year ago from april i was awarded top 2000 technicaians in the Nation from Stellantis of North America. I was(and still am) dealing with life long knee pain and hip pain from just wear and tear of automotive repair. Due to this i knew autom

item.title: Claude's signup workflow is terrible
item.description:
I used claude via the web console for a while, then thought I'd want to go for higher limits, and API usage.

I click and end up here https://claude.ai/upgrade.

Does it say anything about API or not? Does it explain what the usage limits are? How often they reset?

No.

Do

item.title: Claude, I order a whiskey sour, I get spaghetti
